Subject: 20250224-Readout - HMA Washington / SofS Defence Call-OS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Ambassador,
You spoke with SofS Defence on Sunday 23 February. A brief: readout follows:

274

RK

Kind regards,

JCS Royal Navy | Military Assistant and Deputy Chief of Staff to His Majesty’s Ambassador
| British Embassy Washington

3100 Massachusetts Ave NW, Washington, DC 20008
Personal

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fedo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign, Commonwealth &
Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

275
parsing_notes: Extract meeting date/time, list of attendees (name + role), agenda/discussion topics as bullet items, any action points (AP 1:, AP 2: patterns). Attendees yield ATTENDED edges with date. Topics/APs are content nodes linked to the meeting event.
